title: Mobile application for the diagnosis and rehabilitation of facial and gait disorders
description: This project focuses on the development of a mobile application aimed at diagnosing and rehabilitating facial and gait disorders. It integrates advanced diagnostic tools and rehabilitation techniques to assist patients and healthcare professionals.

creators.name: Jan Kohout

grants.title: Diagnosis and comprehensive treatment of facial nerve dysfunction using an advanced AI-based platform for facial and sensory (taste) analysis
